name: OLB GROUP, INC.
summary: The OLB Group, Inc. is a FinTech company providing integrated business solutions to merchants across the United States. Its core offerings include payment processing via eVance (an ISO), the OmniSoft cloud-based business management platform, the SecurePay payment gateway, CrowdPay white-label crowdfunding platform, Moola Cloud debit and calling card platforms targeting underbanked communities, and DMINT Bitcoin mining operations in Selmer, Tennessee.

products.name: OmniSoft
products.description: Cloud-based business management platform for merchants to manage inventory, track sales, and process transactions online or in-store.

products.name: eVance
products.description: Independent sales organization providing credit and debit card payment processing solutions to merchants throughout the United States.

products.name: SecurePay
products.description: PCI-compliant payment gateway and virtual terminal certified by Visa and MasterCard, supporting Level II, Level III, and 3D Secure.

products.name: CrowdPay
products.description: White-label capital raising platform for small and midsized businesses supporting Regulation CF, Regulation D, and Regulation A+ offerings.

products.name: Crowd Ignition
products.description: Web-based crowdfunding software for broker-dealers, merchant banks, and law firms to market offerings and collect payments under SEC regulations.

products.name: Moola Cloud
products.description: Debit and calling card platform targeting underbanked communities with digital wallet, mobile app, and cash reload capabilities at ~31,600 US locations.

products.name: DMINT Bitcoin Mining
products.description: Bitcoin mining operation using ASIC-based Antminer S19J Pro computers at a data center in Selmer, Tennessee, with capacity for up to 5,000 machines.

partnerships.description: eVance leverages relationships with three of the top five US merchant processors representing a majority of the merchant processing market.
Seller of 80.01% membership interest in Moola Cloud (f/k/a Cuentas SDI, LLC) per Membership Interest Purchase Agreement dated June 15, 2023.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
